commit.message:
feat: close 16 remaining trap gaps with 4 systemic fixes

Full re-scan of 12 guides found 109 total traps (not 70+).
Coverage: 55 by guides, 19 by AI Rules, 19 by web_fetch, 16 TRUE GAPS.

Fix 1 - New AI Rule: crypto verification completeness
  - AES encrypt/decrypt input/output validation
  - Standard Base64 alphabet (not URL-safe)
  - NeedExtraPaidInfo extra fields in CMV

Fix 2 - Extended infrastructure rule: CDN restriction
  - ReturnURL cannot be behind CDN (CloudFlare/Akamai)

Fix 3 - Strengthened dynamic strategy (步驟 3):
  - Added step: cross-service parameter semantic differences
  - ExpireDate units, BNPL minimums, PaymentType mapping
  - Content-Type inconsistency, Timestamp Unix seconds

Fix 4 - Go-live checklist (guides/16):
  - Added: HTTP 200 status verification item
  - Added: 10-second callback timeout item
  - Added: AES test vector verification item
  - Fixed: cross-reference to nonexistent guides/24 env table

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Improve mockup-prototype skill

- Ask which repo to deploy to before creating the mockup
- Save directly to target repo's local clone, iterate locally
- Don't push until user explicitly asks to deploy
- Auto-open local file in browser during iteration

- Merge PR as part of deploy flow so Pages goes live immediately
- Remove dual-repo pattern, single source of truth

fix: 彻底删除 _LOOKBOOK_KEYWORDS 硬编码 — lookbook 意图由 LLM 语义理解判断

根因：关键词匹配无法区分语义意图（"保持一致性"≠lookbook，"一组照片"≠lookbook）
每删一个关键词就会有下一个误命中，这是打地鼠的游戏。

治本方案：
1. 删除 _LOOKBOOK_KEYWORDS 和 _is_lookbook 硬编码标志
2. 多输出场景同时给 LLM 三个工具：generate_ai_content + propose_plan + analyze_for_lookbook
3. LLM 根据语义理解自己决定走编辑+plan 还是 lookbook 分析
4. lookbook 提示模块通过 _check_lookbook 语义检查触发（历史 plan、"N组/N套"、"多角度"）
5. 删除 _build_context_sections / _build_llm_messages 中的 is_lookbook 参数
6. _select_prompt_modules 不再用 override_lookbook，改用 _check_lookbook

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Position-based NFA reduction for bitnfa backend (#16)

* Initial plan

* Implement position-based NFA reduction for bitnfa backend

Reduce bit-NFA positions by eliminating epsilon-only intermediate states
from the Thompson NFA (Glushkov-equivalent construction). Only states
with outgoing byte transitions plus the accept state are assigned bit
positions. Includes forward and backward reachability pruning.

Typical position reduction: 25-58% fewer positions vs raw Thompson NFA.

Co-authored-by: strimo378 <59825937+strimo378@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add tests for position-NFA reduction optimization

Co-authored-by: strimo378 <59825937+strimo378@users.noreply.github.com>

* Address code review: fix shallow list copy, add alternation uint32 tests

Co-authored-by: strimo378 <59825937+strimo378@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add test-and-log skill

Reusable agent skill for testing a target (demo, script, pipeline,
CLI command) without modifying source code, then writing a structured
log of the process, outcomes, anomalies, and issues.

- SKILL.md: 6-step workflow (clarify params, prerequisites, run steps,
  identify anomalies, write log, no code changes)
- agents/openai.yaml: explicit-invocation-only (allow_implicit_invocation: false)
- references/log-template.md: log structure with per-step result codes
  (pass/fail/anomaly) and anomaly severity classification

commit.message:
fix(polling): close idle sessions when CWD is shared with another session (#30)

Sessions never transitioned to "closed" when another copilot session was
active in the same working directory. The is_session_process_running
check matches by CWD, so any active session in the same repo kept old
sessions appearing as "process running".

Add a staleness check: when a session is idle and its last event is older
than 5 minutes, close it regardless of process_running — the running
process likely belongs to a different session sharing the same CWD.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add 3 systemic developer trap rules (HTTP 200, RtnCode type, dual callback)

Deep review of 12 guides found ~70 potential traps. After filtering:
- 7 already covered by dynamic web_fetch strategy
- 8 already covered by existing AI Rules / guides
- 5 already covered by PHP SDK translation rule #6
- 3 TRUE systemic gaps found and fixed:

1. Callback HTTP Status must be 200 (201/202/204 triggers retry)
2. RtnCode is STRING not INT (=== 1 always false in non-PHP)
3. ATM/CVS/Barcode have TWO callbacks (PaymentInfoURL + ReturnURL)

Added to SKILL.md AI Rules and SKILL_OPENAI.md Critical Rules.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(ui): persist window size and position with tauri-plugin-window-state (#28)

Replace custom screen_width setting with tauri-plugin-window-state plugin
that automatically saves and restores window size, position, maximized,
and fullscreen state.

- Add tauri-plugin-window-state dependency
- Register plugin with SIZE, POSITION, MAXIMIZED, FULLSCREEN flags
- Save window state on close (before hiding to tray)
- Remove screen_width from Settings struct, DB layer, and save command
- Remove Screen Width slider from Settings UI

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: CombatEngine momentum increment + threshold effects (#1274)

Implements WI-C (momentum increment) and WI-D (threshold effects) for all 4 momentum classes.

- Warrior Fury (max 5): Add(1) on attack dealt + hit taken; Consume() → 2× damage
- Mage Arcane Charge (max 3): Add(1) after ability; Consume() → 0 mana + 1.25× damage
- Paladin Devotion (max 4): Add(1) on DivineShield absorb/cast + LayOnHands; Consume() → Stun on HolyStrike  
- Ranger Focus (max 3): Add(1) on 0-damage enemy turn; Reset on HP damage; Consume() → effectiveDef=0
- Momentum reset on flee

InitPlayerMomentum() called at combat start. AddRangerFocusIfNoDamage() helper at 5 call sites.

Rebased cleanly onto master after #1293 merge. Build: 0 errors, 0 warnings.

Closes part of #1274

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: use context.TODO() instead of nil context (SA1012) (#5)

Co-authored-by: Jason Aloi <jasonaloi707@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: 深度修复偶发生图不创建节点 + SSE 断连丢任务 + 多输出幻觉

根因修复:
1. addNodes rollback 不再删除生成中节点 (generatingTaskId 非空时保留内存 + 5s 重试)
2. task_created 补建缺失的 result entry (task_preparing 被跳过时)
3. SSE 事件处理分离 JSON 解析和 handler 错误 (防止 handler 异常被吞掉)
4. task_created 兜底创建占位节点 (canvasNodeId 缺失时)
5. onTaskComplete 条件性 _handledTaskIds (未找到节点时允许轮询重试)
6. _recoverInFlightTasks 为完成任务补建画布节点

SSE 断连修复:
- flush before yield 防止 GeneratorExit 丢失结果
- background plan continuation (asyncio.create_task)

多输出修复:
- 删除误导性 'one call → one output' 系统提示
- 中文数字正则支持 (两/二/三...百)
- 统一 lookbook 检测路径 (单一 _is_lookbook 标志)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Initial commit: Gold trading signal system

Automated BUY/SELL signal system for WisdomTree Physical Swiss Gold (SGBS.AS).
Fetches prices via yfinance, computes MA15/MA60 signals, sends Telegram alerts,
and tracks signal accuracy (GOOD/BAD/NEUTRAL) over time.

All credentials (TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID) are read from
environment variables — never hardcoded.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: gold-tracker
repository.description: Automated BUY/SELL signal system for WisdomTree Physical Swiss Gold via yfinance + Telegram alerts

commit.message:
feat: add 'unwrap PHP SDK abstractions' translation rule

Systemic fix for cross-stack integration pitfalls: instead of enumerating
every hidden behavior, instruct AI to decompose PHP SDK encapsulation
before translating (Content-Type, HTTP details, return types, implicit behaviors).

Added to SKILL.md §程式碼翻譯品質準則 rule #6 and SKILL_OPENAI.md rule #5.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: single Windows exe — DLLs already embedded, no need to ship separately

binary, and main.rs extracts them to %LOCALAPPDATA%\ShadowRust\dlls at
first launch (with /DELAYLOAD ensuring SetDllDirectoryW is called first).

CI changes:

commit.message:
docs: guides/02 warn ECPG callback is Form POST not JSON

3D Secure completion sends result via browser Form POST (application/x-www-form-urlencoded)
with field name 'ResultData', not JSON body. Common trap: request.json() fails silently
and causes false 'payment failed' despite successful transaction.

commit.message:
Claude/review financials migration 18ico (#330)

* Migrate financial reporting from legacy V2 to T12 system

Phase 1: Add Actual vs Budget variance view with GET /api/v1/t12/variance
  endpoint and T12VarianceReport frontend component with monthly detail
  toggle (Var$/Actual/Budget) and color-coded favorable/unfavorable variances.

Phase 2: Add configurable per-unit KPI summary cards powered by
  kpi_account_mapping table (migration 177). KPIs computed from
  template-level totals with database-configurable row_key mappings.
  T12KPISummary component renders above the T12 table.

Phase 3: Simplify property detail page financial integration. Rewrite
  FinancialPerformanceHighlights to use T12 KPI data instead of 3
  separate V2 API calls. Add "View Full Report" link to /financial page.

Phase 4: Add XLSX/CSV export via GET /api/v1/t12/report/export with
  accounting formatting, support for both standard and variance modes.

Phase 5: Rebuild Report Hub variance analysis on T12 data. New
  T12VarianceReportService reads from gl_financial_data instead of
  scheduler_financials, maintains same API contract for email/export/schedule.

Phase 6: Remove ~7,700 lines of legacy code:
  - Delete analytics_service_v2.py and 10 supporting modules
  - Delete variance_report_service.py (replaced by T12 version)
  - Delete financial_v2.py route and router registration
  - Delete frontend: IncomeStatement, VarianceReportTable, DrillDownModal,
    useFinancials hook, financial API client, 3 redirect page stubs
  - Update all consumers (AI tools, forecasting, report registry,
    dependencies) to use T12ReportService

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NknTfHk4dfD1YFp6q7LaED

* fix: financial page property selector + audit corrections

- Replace plain HTML selects with searchable combobox components
  (PropertyCombobox, SearchableSelect) matching PropertySelector style:
  search input, cyan checkbox selection, click-outside close, clear button
- Gate useT12Variance to only fire when in variance mode (enabled param)
  eliminates unnecessary parallel API call on every page load
- Fix KPI summary to only render in actual/budget mode, not variance mode
- Align filter bar styling to use cyan-500 accent (matching PropertySelector)
  instead of accent-500/slate-600 inconsistencies

commit.message:
Fix editor close button and stale closure keybindings

The editor had stale closure issues where callbacks captured at
CodeMirror creation time (Mod-s keymap) never updated when props
changed. Fixed by introducing handleSaveRef/handleCloseRef that
stay current via useEffect syncs.

- Close button: uses handleClose callback (wraps onClose prop)
- Mod-s keymap: uses handleSaveRef.current (always fresh)
- Alt+Q / Escape: uses handleCloseRef.current (always fresh)
- Document keydown: removed onClose/handleSave from deps (uses refs)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
[msbuild] Fix incremental build for Metal shaders. Fixes #24816. (#24829)

The _SmeltMetal target lacked Inputs/Outputs attributes, causing Metal
shaders to always be recompiled even when unchanged. This follows the
same cache/stamp file pattern used by _CoreCompileInterfaceDefinitions:

- _BeforeSmeltMetal: deletes cache when any Metal file is newer
- _ReadSmeltedMetal: reads cached _SmeltedMetal items for incremental builds
- _SmeltMetal: now has Inputs/Outputs and writes cache after compilation

Also adds a unit test (MetalShadersNotRecompiled) that verifies
_SmeltMetal and _TemperMetal are skipped on the second build when
no Metal files have changed.

Fixes https://github.com/dotnet/macios/issues/24816

repository.name: macios

commit.message:
fix: detect host tmux and pass NAS_HOST_TMUX into container

Copilot CLI calls xclip for clipboard, which fails in Docker without
X11/Wayland. The OSC 52 shim needs tmux DCS passthrough when the host
runs tmux, but $TMUX is not set inside Docker.

MountStage now checks the host's $TMUX and sets NAS_HOST_TMUX=1 in the
container env. The osc52-clip shim uses this to decide whether to wrap
sequences in DCS passthrough.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: enable TypeScript strict mode and fix type errors (#25)

## Summary
- Adds `noUncheckedIndexedAccess: true` to `tsconfig.json` (strict mode
was already enabled)
- Fixes 25 type errors surfaced by `noUncheckedIndexedAccess` across
`documentSymbolProvider.ts`, `extension.ts`, and test files
- Improves type safety with proper null checks and narrowing instead of
unsafe assertions

## Test plan
- [X] `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0 with no errors
- [X] `npm run compile` passes
- [X] `npm run lint` passes
- [X] `npm test` passes

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

test: Edge case coverage batch (#1251 #1249 #1248 #1243 #1239 #1233) (#1292)

* fix: remove duplicate EnemyTypeRegistry in Engine, canonicalize in Systems (#1224)

* test: Add edge case coverage for status effects, navigation, loot, combat, set bonuses, save/load (#1251 #1249 #1248 #1243 #1239 #1233)

43 new tests in Dungnz.Tests/EdgeCaseBatchTests.cs

#1251 — StatusEffectStatStackingTests (6 tests): Different effects that modify
  the same stat (BattleCry, Weakened, Slow, Fortified, Curse) are summed
  additively via GetStatModifier, not overwritten.

#1249 — NavigationDeadEndTests (5 tests): go west/south to non-existent exits
  shows 'can't go that way' error. Bare 'go' and unknown direction word also
  produce correct error messages.

#1248 — LootTableFloorEdgeCaseTests (6 tests): RollDrop with dungeonFloor=0 or
  negative values does not throw. Floor 0 returns gold only; epic/legendary
  drop paths (floor >= 5/6) are not triggered.

#1243 — CombatDeadEnemyTests (5 tests): Enemy at HP=0 resolves as Won without
  player input. Dead enemy deals no damage. HP stays clamped at 0.

#1239 — SetBonusThresholdTests (8 tests): Equipping the Nth set piece crosses
  the threshold and activates the bonus. 1-piece gives 0 bonus; 2nd piece
  activates it. Covers ironclad, shadowstalker, and arcanist sets.

#1233 — PlayerSettingsRoundTripTests (13 tests): All 6 PlayerClass values,
  Mana/MaxMana, all 3 Difficulty values, CurrentFloor, and Seed survive
  save/load round-trip. Compound state test combines class+difficulty+floor.

Before: 1815 tests | After: 1858 tests | Delta: +43, all green

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* docs(romanoff): record edge-case coverage batch session notes

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: replace signal-based assessment with question-based quantitative evaluation

- Rewrite assess.md: two-phase adaptive questionnaire (calibration + deep dive)
  with ask_user interactive choices and quantitative scoring (max 17pts → L1-L8)
- Delete assess.sh: project signals reflect project author, not current user
- Update CLAUDE.md: first interaction triggers /coach:assess, level detection
  table repositioned as behavioral observation cues only
- Update PROGRESS.template.md: add Assessment Method field
- Remove assess.sh dependencies from on-stop.sh, tier2-prompt.md, coach-cli.sh,
  progress.sh, install.sh
- Add --yes/-y flag to uninstall scripts, skip interactive prompt from /coach:uninstall
- Update directory trees in CLAUDE.md, README.md, README.zh.md
